name: rplB_consensus_Firmicutes
description: Conserved single-copy gene rplB consensus for Firmicutes. 50S ribosomal protein L2 (~830 bp); single-copy phylogenetic anchor (PhyEco / CheckM). Used in PhyEco / CheckM-style genome-completeness panels and as 16S-orthogonal phylogenetic marker. Allow moderate-to-high mismatch within the group.
